# Azure model provider API URL construction (2026-03-04 11:30Z)

_**User**_

Search the codebase to understand how the "azure" model provider constructs API URLs for chat completions. Specifically:

1. Find all code related to the "azure" provider configuration and URL construction
2. Find how `api` field values like "openai-completions", "azure", "azure-openai" etc. affect the URL path
3. Find how `baseUrl` is combined with deployment names / model IDs for Azure OpenAI
4. Find the available `api` type options and what URL patterns they produce
5. Look for any Azure-specific path like `/openai/deployments/` in the source code

The working API URL pattern is: `http://10.11.197.97/openai/deployments/gpt-5.2/chat/completions`
The current config has: `baseUrl: "http://10.11.197.97/"` and `api: "openai-completions"`

I need to understand what config values would produce the correct URL. Return all relevant code snippets and file paths.

---

_**Agent (model composer-1.5, mode Agent)**_

            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 224

          {
            "text": " * Derive the Ollama native API base URL from a configured base URL.",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": " * Users typically configure &#96;baseUrl&#96; with a &#96;/v1&#96; suffix (e.g.",
            "lineNumber": 227

            "text": " * &#96;http://192.168.20.14:11434/v1&#96;) for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.",
            "lineNumber": 228

            "lineNumber": 229

            "lineNumber": 230

            "text": "export function resolveOllamaApiBase(configuredBaseUrl?: string): string {",

          },

            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Strip trailing slash, then strip /v1 suffix if present",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },

            "text": "  const trimmed = configuredBaseUrl.replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");",
            "lineNumber": 237

          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * OpenCode Zen model catalog with dynamic fetching, caching, and static fallback.",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " * OpenCode Zen is a pay-as-you-go token-based API that provides access to curated",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 5

          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 6

          {
            "text": " * Note: OpenCode Black ($20/$100/$200/month subscriptions) is a separate product",

            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {

      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "### Other built-in providers",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "- OpenRouter: &#96;openrouter&#96; (&#96;OPENROUTER_API_KEY&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "- Example model: &#96;openrouter/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "- Kilo Gateway: &#96;kilocode&#96; (&#96;KILOCODE_API_KEY&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "- Example model: &#96;kilocode/anthropic/claude-opus-4.6&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "- xAI: &#96;xai&#96; (&#96;XAI_API_KEY&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "- Mistral: &#96;mistral&#96; (&#96;MISTRAL_API_KEY&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "- Example model: &#96;mistral/mistral-large-latest&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "- CLI: &#96;openclaw onboard --auth-choice mistral-api-key&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "- Groq: &#96;groq&#96; (&#96;GROQ_API_KEY&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "- Cerebras: &#96;cerebras&#96; (&#96;CEREBRAS_API_KEY&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "  - GLM models on Cerebras use ids &#96;zai-glm-4.7&#96; and &#96;zai-glm-4.6&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "  - OpenAI-compatible base URL: &#96;https://api.cerebras.ai/v1&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "- GitHub Copilot: &#96;github-copilot&#96; (&#96;COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN&#96; / &#96;GH_TOKEN&#96; / &#96;GITHUB_TOKEN&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "- Hugging Face Inference: &#96;huggingface&#96; (&#96;HUGGINGFACE_HUB_TOKEN&#96; or &#96;HF_TOKEN&#96;) — OpenAI-compatible router; example model: &#96;huggingface/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1&#96;; CLI: &#96;openclaw onboard --auth-choice huggingface-api-key&#96;. See [Hugging Face (Inference)](/providers/huggingface).",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "## Providers via &#96;models.providers&#96; (custom/base URL)",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "Use &#96;models.providers&#96; (or &#96;models.json&#96;) to add **custom** providers or",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "OpenAI/Anthropic‑compatible proxies.",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "### Moonshot AI (Kimi)",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "Moonshot uses OpenAI-compatible endpoints, so configure it as a custom provider:",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "- Provider: &#96;moonshot&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "- Auth: &#96;MOONSHOT_API_KEY&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "- Example model: &#96;moonshot/kimi-k2.5&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "Kimi K2 model IDs:",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "{/_moonshot-kimi-k2-model-refs:start_/ &amp;&amp; null}",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179

            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "  source_path: gateway/openai-http-api.md",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  workflow: 15",

          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "# OpenAI Chat Completions（HTTP）",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "OpenClaw 的 Gateway 网关可以提供一个小型的 OpenAI 兼容 Chat Completions 端点。",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "此端点**默认禁用**。请先在配置中启用它。",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;POST /v1/chat/completions&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "- 与 Gateway 网关相同的端口（WS + HTTP 多路复用）：&#96;http://&lt;gateway-host&gt;:&lt;port&gt;/v1/chat/completions&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "底层实现中，请求作为普通的 Gateway 网关智能体运行执行（与 &#96;openclaw agent&#96; 相同的代码路径），因此路由/权限/配置与你的 Gateway 网关一致。",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "## 认证",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "使用 Gateway 网关认证配置。发送 bearer 令牌：",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;Authorization: Bearer &lt;token&gt;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "注意事项：",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "- 当 &#96;gateway.auth.mode=\"token\"&#96; 时，使用 &#96;gateway.auth.token&#96;（或 &#96;OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN&#96;）。",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "- 当 &#96;gateway.auth.mode=\"password\"&#96; 时，使用 &#96;gateway.auth.password&#96;（或 &#96;OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PASSWORD&#96;）。",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "## 选择智能体",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "无需自定义头：在 OpenAI &#96;model&#96; 字段中编码智能体 ID：",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;model: \"openclaw:&lt;agentId&gt;\"&#96;（例如：&#96;\"openclaw:main\"&#96;、&#96;\"openclaw:beta\"&#96;）",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;model: \"agent:&lt;agentId&gt;\"&#96;（别名）",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "或通过头指定特定的 OpenClaw 智能体：",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;x-openclaw-agent-id: &lt;agentId&gt;&#96;（默认：&#96;main&#96;）",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "高级选项：",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;x-openclaw-session-key: &lt;sessionKey&gt;&#96; 完全控制会话路由。",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "## 启用端点",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "将 &#96;gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions.enabled&#96; 设置为 &#96;true&#96;：",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json5",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "  gateway: {",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "    http: {",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "      endpoints: {",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "        chatCompletions: { enabled: true },",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "    },",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "## 禁用端点",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "将 &#96;gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions.enabled&#96; 设置为 &#96;false&#96;：",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json5",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "{",

          {
            "text": "  gateway: {",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    http: {",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 76
          }
        ]
      },

}

          },
          {
            "text": "  }",

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 48

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": " * Derive the Ollama native API base URL from a configured base URL.",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": " * Users typically configure &#96;baseUrl&#96; with a &#96;/v1&#96; suffix (e.g.",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": " * &#96;http://192.168.20.14:11434/v1&#96;) for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": " * The native Ollama API lives at the root (e.g. &#96;/api/tags&#96;), so we",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": " * strip the &#96;/v1&#96; suffix when present.",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "export function resolveOllamaApiBase(configuredBaseUrl?: string): string {",
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!configuredBaseUrl) {",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "    return OLLAMA_API_BASE_URL;",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Strip trailing slash, then strip /v1 suffix if present",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "  const trimmed = configuredBaseUrl.replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "  return trimmed.replace(/\\/v1$/i, \"\");",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "// NOTE: We only force &#96;store=true&#96; for *direct* OpenAI Responses.",

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {

            "isSignature": true

          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 224

          {
            "text": " * Derive the Ollama native API base URL from a configured base URL.",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": " * Users typically configure &#96;baseUrl&#96; with a &#96;/v1&#96; suffix (e.g.",
            "lineNumber": 227

            "lineNumber": 228

          {

            "lineNumber": 229

            "lineNumber": 230

          },
          {
            "text": "export function resolveOllamaApiBase(configuredBaseUrl?: string): string {",

          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Strip trailing slash, then strip /v1 suffix if present",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "  const trimmed = configuredBaseUrl.replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "  return trimmed.replace(/\\/v1$/i, \"\");",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {

## 1. Azure 相關程式碼與 URL 建構

### `src/commands/onboard-custom.ts`

**`isAzureUrl`**（僅辨識官方 Azure 網域）：

```34:42:src/commands/onboard-custom.ts
function isAzureUrl(baseUrl: string): boolean {
  try {
    const url = new URL(baseUrl);
    const host = url.hostname.toLowerCase();
    return host.endsWith(".services.ai.azure.com") || host.endsWith(".openai.azure.com");
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}
```

**`transformAzureUrl`**（在 baseUrl 中加入 deployment 路徑）：

```45:61:src/commands/onboard-custom.ts
/**
 * Transforms an Azure AI Foundry/OpenAI URL to include the deployment path.
 * Azure requires: https://host/openai/deployments/<model-id>/chat/completions?api-version=2024-xx-xx-preview
 * ...
 */
function transformAzureUrl(baseUrl: string, modelId: string): string {
  const normalizedUrl = baseUrl.endsWith("/") ? baseUrl.slice(0, -1) : baseUrl;
  if (normalizedUrl.includes("/openai/deployments/")) {
    return normalizedUrl;
  }
  return `${normalizedUrl}/openai/deployments/${modelId}`;
}
```

**`resolveVerificationEndpoint`**（驗證用 endpoint 組裝）：

```276:293:src/commands/onboard-custom.ts
function resolveVerificationEndpoint(params: {
  baseUrl: string;
  modelId: string;
  endpointPath: "chat/completions" | "messages";
}) {
  const resolvedUrl = isAzureUrl(params.baseUrl)
    ? transformAzureUrl(params.baseUrl, params.modelId)
    : params.baseUrl;
  const endpointUrl = new URL(
    params.endpointPath,
    resolvedUrl.endsWith("/") ? resolvedUrl : `${resolvedUrl}/`,
  );
  if (isAzureUrl(params.baseUrl)) {
    endpointUrl.searchParams.set("api-version", "2024-10-21");
  }
  return endpointUrl.href;
}
```

**`applyCustomApiConfig`**（寫入 provider 的 baseUrl）：

```575:577:src/commands/onboard-custom.ts
  // Transform Azure URLs to include the deployment path for API calls
  const resolvedBaseUrl = isAzureUrl(baseUrl) ? transformAzureUrl(baseUrl, modelId) : baseUrl;
```

---

## 2. `api` 欄位與 URL 的關係

`api` 決定使用哪種 adapter，但 **URL 路徑是由 `baseUrl` 決定的**，`api` 本身不直接改 URL。

- `openai-completions`：使用 OpenAI Chat Completions 格式，SDK 會在 `baseUrl` 後接 `/chat/completions`。
- `openai-responses`：使用 Responses API，路徑不同。
- `anthropic-messages`：使用 Anthropic Messages，路徑為 `/v1/messages`。
- `ollama`：使用 Ollama 原生 API，路徑為 `/api/chat`。

---

## 3. `baseUrl` 與 deployment / model ID 的組合

**Model 解析**（`src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.ts`）：

```96:104:src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.ts
    const providerCfg = providers[provider];
    if (providerCfg || modelId.startsWith("mock-")) {
      const configuredModel = providerCfg?.models?.find((candidate) => candidate.id === modelId);
      const fallbackModel: Model<Api> = normalizeModelCompat({
        id: modelId,
        name: modelId,
        api: providerCfg?.api ?? "openai-responses",
        provider,
        baseUrl: providerCfg?.baseUrl,
```

`baseUrl` 來自 provider 設定，所有該 provider 底下的 model 共用同一個 `baseUrl`。  
實際 HTTP 請求由 `@mariozechner/pi-ai` 的 `streamSimple` 發出，會把 `baseUrl` 與 endpoint 路徑組合起來。
